title: dioscorea longituba
intro: Dioscorea longituba, also known as the Chinese yam or tu fu ling, is a species of flowering plant in the yam family. It is a perennial vine native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea longituba include reducing inflammation and improving immune function, as well as aiding in the treatment of conditions such as high blood pressure, fever, and digestive issues. Dioscorea longituba is typically prepared as a decoction or tea by boiling the dried tubers, or as a powder or supplement by grinding the dried roots into a fine powder.
